question: Will Robert Lewandowski win the 2025 Ballon d'Or?
resolution_criteria:
This market will resolve according to winner of the 2025 Ballon D’Or. 

If no 2025 Ballon D’Or winner is declared by December 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET this market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source for this market is official information from France Football (https://www.francefootball.fr/).
